subcodes.first_line: O My Name Mihdi! The letter of the Afnán of Alif and Há - upon him be My glory - which he sent unto thee was received by this Servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی مهدی مکتوب افنان الف و حا علیه بهائی که بتو ارسال داشت عبد حاضر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
